what_it_does: Records metadata for a design-source image asset named p-07 in the presentation-15p set and labels it as design ground-truth.
observations: YAML frontmatter contains id, address, channel, path, blob URI, mime, name, dimensions, source, author_session, created timestamp, and empty links
The asset is an image/jpeg with a blob://b2:... content address
Width and height are both recorded as 0
The body contains a single line: 'SOURCE design ground-truth — presentation-15p/p-07.jpg'
standouts: Explicitly tagged as SOURCE design ground-truth
Image dimensions are 0x0 despite being an image/jpeg asset
Empty links array leaves the asset unconnected to other ledger entries
concerns: Width and height are 0, suggesting missing image dimension extraction
No links or relationships are recorded, limiting navigability
The blob reference has no visible checksum algorithm or integrity metadata
notes: A metadata stub for a single presentation image marked as design ground-truth, but missing dimensions and outbound links.
questions: Why are w and h 0 for an image asset?
What does the empty links array imply about expected downstream references?
Is the blob URI intended to be the canonical content address or a secondary copy?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to record design-source ground-truth for an image; actual content is a metadata stub with missing dimensions and no links, so it documents identity more than content.
intention_signals: To provide a discoverable, versioned ledger entry for a presentation image so downstream systems can resolve and interpret the design source.
contribution: Supplies an identity and provenance record for one design image, including a content-addressed blob reference, MIME type, authorship timestamp, and ground-truth label, which a fused system can use to locate and attribute the asset.
summary_for_embedding: A ledger metadata file for the design-source image presentation-15p/p-07.jpg, including blob reference, MIME type, authorship, and a ground-truth label.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog a single presentation image as design ground-truth with content-addressed provenance for downstream retrieval and attribution.
